title: water based deposition nucleation

body: Accounts for liquid-ice transitions in temperature and liquid supersaturation tendencies in the parcel. Documentation also updated to reflect the change. Updated aqua tests.
title: lat heat of fus in parcel dT/dt and dSl/dt
